mapper.select: select a.org_id, a.user_type, a.position_id, c.org_name, c.path_code, b.position_name, string_agg(d.org_name, '-') path_name from po_users_organization a left join po_position b on a.position_id = b.position_id left join po_organization c on a.org_id = c.org_id left join po_organization d on STRPOS(concat('.', c.path_code, '.'), concat('.', d.org_id, '.')) > 0 where user_id =#{userId} group by a.org_id, a.user_type, a.position_id, c.org_name, c.path_code, b.position_name

select a.org_id, a.org_code, a.org_name, a.org_index, a.parent_org_id, a.org_desc, b.org_name parent_org_name from po_organization a left join po_organization b on a.parent_org_id = b.org_id where a.org_id =#{orgId}
select count(1) from po_organization where parent_org_id =#{parentOrgId}

select a.org_id, a.org_code, a.org_name, a.org_type, a.parent_org_id, a.org_level, a.org_index, a.create_date, a.update_date, a.path_code, a.org_desc from po_organization a join po_users_organization b on a.org_id = b.org_id and b.user_id = #{userId}
select count(1) from po_users_organization a join po_users b on a.user_id = b.user_id where b.state != 'X' and a.org_id =#{userId}
select min(org_id) from po_organization where parent_org_id = -1
select org_id from po_organization where path_code like CONCAT(#{pathCode},'%')

select a.org_id from po_organization a where a.state != 'X'
and
a.path_code like concat('%', #{item} '%')

select a.org_id, a.org_code, a.org_name, a.org_type, a.parent_org_id, a.org_level, a.org_index, a.create_date, a.update_date, a.path_code, a.org_desc from po_organization a join po_org_external_system b on a.org_id = b.org_id where a.unionid =#{unionId}

select a.user_id, a.user_code, a.user_name, b.grant_obj_id from po_users a join au_privilege_grant b on a.user_id = b.grant_to_obj_id where a.state = 'A' and b.grant_type = 'ALLOW_MANAGE' and b.grant_obj_type = 'AGENT' and b.status_cd = 'A' and b.grant_to_type = 'RED' and b.grant_to_obj_type = 'USER' and b.grant_obj_id = #{grantObjId}
select org_id from po_organization where parent_org_id = -1
